falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (key resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a strong bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day realized volatility of the Nasdaq 100 exceeds 35% (current level: 22%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would contradict the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a high-probability blowoff phase rather than a consolidation pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the VIX index drops below 18 (current level: 26)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in volatility would falsify the pattern's implied uncertainty, suggesting a confirmed trend reversal rather than an ambiguous phase

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
